# zabbix_host_interface (Data Source)

Fetches a Zabbix host interface by ID, or by `host_id` + `type`. Exactly one lookup strategy must be used.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a host interface by its ID
data "zabbix_host_interface" "by_id" {
  id = "42"
}

# Look up a host interface by host ID and type
data "zabbix_host_interface" "agent_iface" {
  host_id = "10084"
  type    = "agent"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `host_id` (String) ID of the host. Used with `type` for composite lookup.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the host interface. One of `id` or (`host_id` + `type`) must be set.
- `type` (String) Interface type. One of: `agent`, `snmp`, `ipmi`, `jmx`. Used with `host_id` for composite lookup.

### Read-Only

- `dns` (String) DNS name of the interface.
- `ip` (String) IP address of the interface.
- `main` (Boolean) Whether this is the default interface of its type for the host.
- `port` (String) Port used by the interface.
- `snmp` (Attributes) SNMP-specific settings. Only populated for `type = "snmp"` interfaces. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--snmp))
- `use_ip` (Boolean) Whether the IP address (`true`) or DNS name (`false`) is used for monitoring.

<a id="nestedatt--snmp"></a>
### Nested Schema for `snmp`

Read-Only:

- `auth_passphrase` (String, Sensitive) SNMPv3 authentication passphrase.
- `auth_protocol` (String) SNMPv3 authentication protocol.
- `bulk_requests` (Boolean) Whether bulk SNMP requests are used.
- `community` (String) SNMP community string.
- `context_name` (String) SNMPv3 context name.
- `priv_passphrase` (String, Sensitive) SNMPv3 privacy passphrase.
- `priv_protocol` (String) SNMPv3 privacy protocol.
- `security_level` (String) SNMPv3 security level.
- `security_name` (String) SNMPv3 security name.
- `version` (String) SNMP version.
